introSection: Giant Racer was a wooden roller coaster located at Redcar Amusement Park in Redcar, North Yorkshire, England, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The initial drop appears to have been modified at some point, as some photos show a much steeper curved drop, while others show a more gentle straight drop.

sections.title: External links
sections.content:
* Video footage of the Giant Racer
 * A photograph of the Giant Racer

fullText:
Giant Racer was a wooden roller coaster located at Redcar Amusement Park in Redcar, North Yorkshire, England, UK.

The initial drop appears to have been modified at some point, as some photos show a much steeper curved drop, while others show a more gentle straight drop.




 * Video footage of the Giant Racer
 * A photograph of the Giant Racer
